schema:name: pos MoonGen experiment results RO-Crate
schema:description: This RO-Crate contains results from a MoonGen-based network performance experiment conducted using a pos (plain orchestrating service) testbed. The experiment evaluates the latency and energy consumption characteristics of a network device under test (DuT) when driven by a programmable packet generator (LoadGen) using MoonGen.
